html:
Exclusive to:

Puffed Potato Soufflé is a Warly-specific Food Item cooked in the Portable Crock Pot, that is exclusive to Don't Starve Together. It requires two Potatoes and an Egg, and takes 40 seconds to cook. The filler can not be Inedible or Meats.

Contents

  • 1 Recipe
  • 2 Examples
  • 3 Tips
  • 4 Gallery

Recipe

×2

x1.0

Filler can not be Inedibles or Meats

Examples

×2

×2

Tips

  • When comparing the minimum ingredients required to cook it to the output, this is the least efficient dish in the game, losing even more stat points over its ingredients than the joke dish Powdercake. As such, even Warly players should opt for other uses for their potatoes; such as Fancy Spiralled Tubers for similar hunger to its ingredients and some sanity, Creamy Potato Purée for benefits similar to a cooked potato and 33 sanity (Keep in mind Warly cannot eat cooked potatoes himself), or simply hand them to other players in a multiplayer setting as potatoes cooked over a fire have great stats.

Gallery

  • Icon used as emoji for Official Klei Discord.
By TypeBy Crock Pot Value

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Puffed Potato Soufflé là một Món ăn đặc trưng của Warly được nấu trong Nồi Hầm Di Động, chỉ có trong Don't Starve Together. Nó cần hai củ khoai tây và một quả trứng và mất 40 giây để nấu. Chất độn không thể là Không ăn được hoặc Thịt.

'''Puffed Potato Soufflé''' is a [[Warly]]-specific [[Food]] [[Item]] cooked in the [[Portable Crock Pot]], that is exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]''. It requires two [[Potato]]es and an [[Eggs|Egg]], and takes 40 seconds to cook. The filler can not be [[Inedible]] or [[Meats]].

== {{Pic32|Cookbook}} Recipe==
{{Recipe
|item1 = Potatoes
|count1 = 2
|item2 = Eggs
|count2 = 1.0
|comparator2 = x
|item3 = Filler
|tool = Portable Crock Pot
|result = Puffed Potato Soufflé
|note = Filler can not be [[Inedibles]] or [[Meats]]
}}

== Examples ==
{{Recipe
|item1 = Potatoes
|count1 = 2
|item2 = Eggs
|item3 = Ripe Stone Fruit
|tool = Portable Crock Pot
|result = Puffed Potato Soufflé
}}
{{Recipe
|item1 = Potatoes
|count1 = 2
|item2 = Eggs
|item3 = Berries
|tool = Portable Crock Pot
|result = Puffed Potato Soufflé
}}
{{clear}}
== {{Pic|32|Prototype}} Tips ==
* When comparing the minimum ingredients required to cook it to the output, this is the least efficient dish in the game, losing even more stat points over its ingredients than the joke dish [[Powdercake]]. As such, even Warly players should opt for other uses for their potatoes; such as [[Fancy Spiralled Tubers]] for similar hunger to its ingredients and some sanity, [[Creamy Potato Purée]] for benefits similar to a cooked potato and 33 sanity (Keep in mind Warly cannot eat cooked potatoes himself), or simply hand them to other players in a multiplayer setting as potatoes cooked over a fire have great stats.
